message:
fix(term): use saturating_sub in scroll_up and scroll_down edge cases

- scroll_up: phys_scroll.end - 1 → saturating_sub(1) prevents underflow
  when scroll region end is 0 (empty region edge case)

- scroll_down: phys_scroll.end - phys_scroll.start → saturating_sub
  prevents underflow if range is inverted. Also phys_scroll.end -
  num_rows → saturating_sub for same reason.

These edge cases are unlikely in normal operation but could be triggered
by malformed escape sequences setting invalid scroll regions.

Validated: 254 term tests pass via rch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

+                    Ordering::SeqCst,
+                )
